An announcement from Unipres ( (JP:5949) ) is now available.

Unipres Corporation has announced the establishment of its medium-term management policies for FY2025-FY2027. These policies are designed to enhance management practices with a focus on the cost of capital and stock price, potentially impacting the company’s operational efficiency and market competitiveness.

Spirent Communications ( (GB:SPT) ) has shared an announcement.

Spirent Communications has announced a change in major holdings, with Morgan Stanley acquiring or disposing of voting rights, resulting in a slight increase in their total voting rights to 8.019585%. An announcement from China Beststudy Education Group ( (HK:3978) ) is now available.

China Beststudy Education Group announced that all resolutions at its Annual General Meeting held on May 16, 2025, were passed by shareholders. Key resolutions included the approval of the audited financial statements for 2024, the declaration of a final dividend, the re-election of directors, and the re-appointment of Deloitte Touche Tohmatsu as auditors. The approval of these resolutions indicates strong shareholder support and may positively impact the company’s governance and financial strategies.

More about China Beststudy Education Group

China Beststudy Education Group is a company incorporated in the Cayman Islands, focusing on the education industry. It is listed on the Hong Kong Stock Exchange under the stock code 3978.

The latest announcement is out from Beijing Tong Ren Tang Chinese Medicine Co ( (HK:3613) ).

Beijing Tong Ren Tang Chinese Medicine Co. has issued a supplemental notice for its upcoming annual general meeting on June 3, 2025. The notice includes additional resolutions for the re-election of Mr. Yue Zheng and Mr. Yan Han as executive directors. Shareholders are advised to submit a revised form of proxy to accommodate these new resolutions, ensuring their voting rights are maintained at the meeting.

Beijing Tong Ren Tang Chinese Medicine Co. is a company incorporated in Hong Kong, operating within the traditional Chinese medicine industry.
